prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年辽宁大学在山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约31288名→47649名→54152名→54147名→56598名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约25310名；202 5年基准位次约56598名，较2024年基本持平略降，位次后移速度有所放缓；该校在山东省综合类招生计划2021年75人、2022年70人、2023年68人、2024年100人 、2025年139人，呈持续扩招态势；2026年（招生计划文件）计划145人，较2025年再增6人（+4.3%），连续第3年扩招，招生名额增加使竞争面扩大，位次数字有进一步后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在124–131名区间，属于中游偏上211层次，在山东省考生中认知度 较高；该校在声誉舆情文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，抖音学校热度总排名第105位、评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量偏低，整体报考关注度平稳，未见异常 波动信号；投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，辽宁大学的应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，对应金融学类、经济学类、财政 学、国际经济与贸易等招生专业，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业覆盖法学（社会热度偏热）、电子信息类（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自 动化（高热推荐）、金融学类（分化观望）、会计学（推荐）等，热门工科与经管类专业并存；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5. 7%），考生规模持续扩大，全省竞争加剧；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市 ，属东北地区，在山东省属于跨省招生；该校在本省（辽宁）招生占比约20%–25%，在山东省招生占比约3%–6%，山东为该校重要生源省份之一，跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响，东 北高校在山东考生中认可度中等。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划继续小幅扩招（+4.3%）、山东省考生总数明显增加（+5.7%）以及学校声誉平稳 、专业热度分化等因素，扩招使位次数字增大但考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应更为显著，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准56598名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约58264名 ，区间57764–58764名。

- 会计学
- 电气工程及其自动化。

- 通信工程

major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间57764–58764名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（如电子信息类、电气工程、经济学类、金融学类），一档专业（法学、会计学、汉语言文学等）可作为冲 刺选择，三档专业（环境类、生物类、化学类、小语种）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<57764名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>58764名）建议以三档保 底为主。辽宁大学应用经济学A-学科对应的经管类专业具有学科优势，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Liaoning University in Shandong Province comprehensive category were approximately 31288 → 47649 → 54152 → 54147 → 56598, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 25310 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 56598, basically flat with a slight decrease compared to 2024, and the pace of ranking backward shift has slowed; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province was 75 in 2021, 70 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 139 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 enrollment plan (enrollment plan document) plans 145 students, an increase of 6 (+4.3%) over 2025, the third consecutive year of expansion, and the increase in enrollment places expands the competition, putting further pressure on ranking numbers to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks about 125th, with stable rankings in the 124–131 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with high recognition among Shandong candidates; there are no obvious negative or positive events in the university's reputation and public opinion files, with a Douyin school popularity total ranking of 105th and a rating of 'average', low short video exposure, overall stable application attention, no abnormal fluctuation signals; there are no records of admission interruptions in the admission abnormal files; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University's Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Finance, Economics, Public Finance, and International Economics and Trade, which have some appeal to candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors cover Law (socially hot), Electronic Information (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Finance (differentiated wait-and-see), Accounting (recommended), etc., with both popular engineering and economics/management majors coexisting; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong Province college entrance examination is about 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) compared to about 681,000 in 2025, with the candidate scale continuing to expand, intensifying competition across the province; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, in the Northeast region, and is a cross-province enrollment in Shandong; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Liaoning) is about 20%–25%, and in Shandong Province about 3%–6%, making Shandong one of its important source provinces, with cross-province application popularity affected by regional preferences, and Northeast universities have moderate recognition among Shandong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4.3%), the significant increase in the total number of Shandong candidates (+5.7%), and the stable university reputation and differentiated major popularity, the expansion increases the ranking number but the intensified competition effect from the increase in candidates is more significant. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will continue to move backward from the 2025 baseline of 56598; the predicted minimum ranking is about 58264, with a range of 57764–58764.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 57764–58764 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering, Economics, Finance) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, etc.) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Environmental, Biological, Chemistry, Small Languages) as safety choices. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<57764) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates with rankings close to the upper limit (>58764) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety choices. Liaoning University's Applied Economics A- discipline corresponding to economics and management majors has disciplinary advantages and deserves special attention.
